LanguageData.GrenadeHEAT.label: High-explosive anti-tank
LanguageData.GrenadeHEAT.description: Grenade with a shaped charge warhead. Detonates on impact, creating a stream of metal that punches through enemy armor.
LanguageData.GrenadeThermobaric.label: Thermobaric
LanguageData.GrenadeThermobaric.description: Disperses and subsequently ignites a fuel-air explosive mix, creating a powerful explosion and potentially igniting flammable objects.
